name: blocks-editor
description: Visual block programming for PlatformIO and Arduino CLI using Blockly

chatParticipants.name: blocks
chatParticipants.description: Create block catalog YAML files for hardware libraries

commands.name: research
commands.description: Research a hardware library for block catalog creation

commands.name: design
commands.description: Design blocks based on gathered research

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate YAML catalog from the design

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate YAML catalog against the schema

languageModelTools.name: blocks-editor-fetch-url
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Fetch any URL and return its text content. Use for reading library documentation, GitHub raw files (.h, .cpp, library.properties), and example sketches.

languageModelTools.name: blocks-editor-search-pio-registry
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search the PlatformIO library registry by name. Returns matching libraries with versions and descriptions.

query.description: Library name or keyword to search

languageModelTools.name: blocks-editor-check-arduino-registry
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Check if a library is in the Arduino Library Registry (installable via arduino-cli lib install). PIO and Arduino registries do not fully overlap — check both.

languageModelTools.name: blocks-editor-validate-catalog
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Validate multi-document YAML against the block catalog schema and run structural checks (duplicate types, precedence, placeholders). Always validate before saving.

yaml.description: The YAML catalog content to validate

languageModelTools.name: blocks-editor-save-catalog
languageModelTools.userDescription: Save a block catalog YAML file to the workspace .blocks/ directory
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Save a YAML catalog file to the workspace .blocks/ directory. The extension auto-reloads catalogs when new files appear.

blocks-editor.generateOnChange.description: Generate code automatically whenever blocks change. When disabled, code is generated only when the Generate C++ button is pressed.

blocks-editor.showMinimap.description: Show a minimap overview of the block workspace in the bottom-right corner.

blocks-editor.categoryColors.markdownDescription:
Map toolbox category labels to hex colours. The label is matched against the `category` field in block catalog YAML files.

Built-in categories (Logic, Loops, Math, Text, Variables, Arrays, Functions) fall back to the default palette if not overridden. Catalog-defined categories fall back to a neutral default.

Example:
```json
{
  "Logic": "#29B6F6",
  "Sensors": "#26A69A"
}
```

blocks-editor.catalogPaths.description: Local directories or remote URLs for block catalog YAML files. Local paths (relative to the workspace root, or absolute) are scanned recursively. URLs (http/https) are downloaded to the project .blocks/ folder on first load; use the "Refresh Remote Catalogs" command to force re-download.

scripts.compile: yarn run check-types && yarn run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: yarn run check-types && yarn run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: yarn run compile-tests && yarn run compile && yarn run lint
